record_types.name: Gps2_Raw

fields.name: Time_Usec
fields.description:
Units: [us]
Timestamp (UNIX Epoch time or time since system boot). The receiving
end can infer timestamp format (since 1.1.1970 or since system boot)
by checking for the magnitude of the number.

fields.name: Eph
fields.description:
GPS HDOP horizontal dilution of position (unitless * 100). If
unknown, set to: UINT16_MAX

fields.name: Epv
fields.description:
GPS VDOP vertical dilution of position (unitless * 100). If unknown,
set to: UINT16_MAX

fields.name: Vel
fields.description:
Units: [cm/s]
GPS ground speed. If unknown, set to: UINT16_MAX

fields.name: Cog
fields.description:
Units: [cdeg]
Course over ground (NOT heading, but direction of movement):
0.0..359.99 degrees. If unknown, set to: UINT16_MAX

fields.name: Satellites_Visible
fields.description: Number of satellites visible. If unknown, set to UINT8_MAX

subprograms.name: Decode

from the Connect's buffer. CRC_Valid is set to
True if x25crc is valid for the message.
